source: ICH S6(R1), 2012; Hey et al., 2021, Int J Toxicol; Pandher et al., 2012, Toxicol Pathol
description: Fc-mediated class effects expected for all human-sequence or humanized mAbs and Fc-fusion proteins, regardless of target. These findings arise from Fc biology (FcγR interactions, complement activation, FcRn recycling), immunogenicity (ADA formation), and local reactions to protein administration. This is the base layer for all mAb overlay profiles.

expected_findings.severity_threshold: Necrosis or non-healing ulceration = never reclassify as expected
expected_findings.rationale: Local protein antigen induces mild inflammation at SC/IM administration site; universal class effect for biologics. (ICH S6(R1); Pandher et al., 2012, Toxicol Pathol)

expected_findings.description: Lymphoid hyperplasia in injection site draining nodes
expected_findings.rationale: Immune response to protein antigen drains to regional lymph nodes; expected germinal center activation from repeated dosing. (ICH S6(R1); general toxicological pathology)

expected_findings.severity_threshold: Splenomegaly >3x reference weight or spontaneous rupture = never reclassify
expected_findings.rationale: Non-specific immune organ activation from repeated protein antigen administration; Fc-mediated FcγR stimulation. (ICH S6(R1); general toxicological precedent)

expected_findings.description: Splenic germinal center expansion from repeated antigen exposure
expected_findings.rationale: Expected immune organ response to repeated protein administration; germinal center expansion reflects active humoral immunity. (ICH S6(R1))

expected_findings.description: Globulin increase (immune stimulation from protein antigen)
expected_findings.rationale: Expected humoral immune response to repeated protein antigen exposure; polyclonal immunoglobulin production driven by Fc-mediated immune activation. (ICH S6(R1); Hey et al., 2021, Int J Toxicol)

expected_findings.severity_threshold: Immune complex disease (vasculitis, glomerulonephritis) or anaphylaxis = never reclassify. ADA with PK/PD impact = study interpretation flag, not adverse per se.
expected_findings.rationale: Universal immunogenic response to human-sequence proteins in preclinical species. ICH S6(R1): 'induction of antibody formation in animals is not predictive of potential for antibody formation in humans.' (ICH S6(R1), EMA 2012; Hey et al., 2021, Int J Toxicol)
